AiEvaluationDefinition.description: Verifies the Inside Sales agent checks email consent FIRST and only sends a cart-recovery offer when consent exists.
AiEvaluationDefinition.name: Inside_Sales_Test

expectation.expectedValue: The agent verifies the lead has email consent, then sends a recovery coupon and marks the lead contacted.
expectation.name: bot_response_rating

inputs.utterance: Send a cart recovery offer to lead 00Qfj00000V9p7uEAB.

expectation.expectedValue: The agent checks consent first, finds the lead has NOT granted email consent, and stops without sending a recovery offer.
expectation.name: bot_response_rating

inputs.utterance: Send a cart recovery offer to lead 00Qfj00000V9p7vEAB.
